# FCS Provider

Interact with the FCS platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    fcs = {
      source  = "focusnetcloud/fcs"
      version = "~> 0.10"
    }
  }
}

provider "fcs" {
  endpoint = "https://api.focusnet.de"
  token    = var.fcs_token # or export FCS_TOKEN
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint` (String) Base URL of the FCS API, e.g. https://api.focusnet.de.

### Optional

- `token` (String, Sensitive) Tenant-scoped FCS API token (fcs_...). May also be set via the FCS_TOKEN environment variable; one of the two is required.
